description: Test document corpus for Kreuzberg vs MarkItDown benchmark

documents.source: Internal sample — the known-failure scanned PDF (MarkItDown extracted only one image, missed all text content). Original filename: 'Sample #1 - JE.pdf'
documents.notes: This is the primary motivation for this benchmark. MarkItDown bare mode failed to extract text from this document in production.

documents.source: Internal sample — audit plan document. Original filename: '2026 Audit Plan_FINAL_Dec 1_2025.pdf'
documents.notes: Small native PDF (85KB) with embedded fonts. Represents a typical structured internal document.

documents.source: Internal sample — incentives accrual document. Original filename: '6120+Incentives+2023+Accrual+excess+reversal.pdf'
documents.notes: Larger native PDF (1.1MB, 3 pages) with financial data and likely tables. Represents a moderately complex document.

documents.source: Internal sample — incentives accrual Excel workbook. Original filename: '6120+Incentives+2023+Accrual+excess+reversal.xlsx'
documents.notes: Large Excel file (3.1MB). Key test for table/grid extraction fidelity.
1.3MB Word document with mixed formatting. Tests DOCX extraction fidelity.

documents.source: Created as test fixture using python-pptx. Contains title slide, bullet point slide, and table slide.
documents.notes: Minimal PPTX fixture created programmatically. Tests basic PPTX structure extraction including title, bullets, and table data.

documents.source: Created as test fixture using Pillow. Contains structured text mimicking a financial invoice.
documents.notes: PNG image with visible text requiring OCR. Tests image-to-text extraction capability of both tools.
